author: wddgit
body:
#### PR description:

Remove dependence of FWCore on FWStorage by moving the class FromFile from FWCore/Sources to FWStorage/Catalog. This is includes all the changes that move requires in other files. Header includes and BuildFiles needed to be modified. The derived sources need to use FromFile directly instead of via a base class.

This also allowed deleting 2 base classes in the hierarchy of base classes for sources. That simplifies that hierarchy which was too complicated.

This is a follow on to the recent PR that moved the Catalog package from FWCore to FWStorage (#50390).

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2035

#### PR validation:

Existing unit tests pass. This should not change the behavior or output of anything. Refactoring only. There are not any new features in this.
title: Remove dependence of FWCore on FWStorage
